description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features the name 'Jack' in bold black letters above a stylized cartoon sloth face, giving it a playful and personalized appearance. The cup's rim is thick and smoothly finished, suggesting durability and comfort for drinking. The handle is ergonomically shaped, allowing for an easy grip. The surface of the cup is smooth and glossy, reflecting light softly. There are no visible cracks, chips, or additional decorative elements apart from the front artwork.
description: A white ceramic cup with a smooth, glossy finish, featuring the name 'Jack' and a cartoon sloth face on the front, and a single rounded handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Jack' text and cartoon sloth face, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible artwork or text.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, plain surface with no visible artwork.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing a plain, undecorated surface with no handle visible.
